description_long: This is a modern storage bed with a rectangular wooden frame finished in a muted gray tone. The bed features a plaid-patterned comforter in shades of blue, gray, and white, draped neatly over the mattress. Two gray pillows rest against a simple, flat headboard, which is slightly taller than the rest of the frame. The bed includes two pull-out drawers integrated into the lower side of the frame, providing additional storage space. The overall design is functional and minimalistic, suitable for urban apartments or compact living spaces. The visible surfaces are smooth, with the bedding adding a soft, inviting texture.
description: A modern gray storage bed with a plaid comforter, two pillows, and integrated side drawers, featuring a simple headboard and a clean, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plaid comforter, two pillows, headboard, and two storage drawers on the lower frame.
description_view_1: Foot view highlighting the solid footboard and the width of the bed, with the comforter draping over the edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the comforter, pillows, and the plain side of the bed frame without visible drawers.
description_view_3: Head view showing the headboard, two pillows, and the full width of the plaid comforter.
